requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Botswana BOBS / BERA / BPC Solar PV Grid-Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——博茨瓦纳BOBS / BERA / BPC太阳能光伏并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——波札那BOBS / BERA / BPC太陽能光伏併網要求

summary.en: BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards) publishes Botswana Standards (BOS) that predominantly adopt IEC standards. IEC 62109-2 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) and its parent standard IEC 62109-1 (Part 1: General requirements) are the applicable international safety standards for grid-connected solar PV inverters under the BOBS IEC-adoption framework. BERA (Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority) technical licensing conditions for grid-tied PV generation, and BPC (Botswana Power Corporation) network connection conditions, are expected to reference or require IEC 62109-1/-2 safety compliance for inverter equipment. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the internationally expected form of IEC 62109-1/-2 safety compliance demonstration. Note: As of 2026-06-14, no publicly available standalone Botswana national technical regulation expressly mandating IEC 62109-1/-2 for solar PV inverters has been identified in the open literature. Exporters must confirm the current safety standard requirements directly with BOBS (bobstandards.bw), BERA (bera.co.bw), and BPC (bpc.bw) before equipment submission.
summary.zh: BOBS（博茨瓦纳标准局）发布主要采纳IEC标准的博茨瓦纳标准（BOS）。IEC 62109-2（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）及其母标准IEC 62109-1（第1部分：通用要求）是BOBS IEC采纳框架下并网太阳能光伏逆变器适用的国际安全标准。BERA（博茨瓦纳能源监管局）并网光伏发电技术许可条件及BPC（博茨瓦纳电力公司）电网连接条件，预期将参照或要求逆变器设备符合IEC 62109-1/-2安全标准。来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方型式试验证据是国际公认的IEC 62109-1/-2安全合规证明形式。注意：截至2026年6月14日，尚未在公开文献中发现专门对太阳能光伏逆变器强制要求IEC 62109-1/-2的博茨瓦纳国家独立技术法规。出口商在提交设备文件前须直接向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）、BERA（bera.co.bw）和BPC（bpc.bw）确认现行安全标准要求。
summary.zht: BOBS（波札那標準局）發布主要採納IEC標準的波札那標準（BOS）。IEC 62109-2（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）及其母標準IEC 62109-1（第1部分：通用要求）是BOBS IEC採納框架下併網太陽能光伏逆變器適用的國際安全標準。BERA（波札那能源監管局）併網光伏發電技術許可條件及BPC（波札那電力公司）電網連接條件，預期將參照或要求逆變器設備符合IEC 62109-1/-2安全標準。來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方型式試驗證據是國際公認的IEC 62109-1/-2安全合規證明形式。注意：截至2026年6月14日，尚未在公開文獻中發現專門對太陽能光伏逆變器強制要求IEC 62109-1/-2的波札那國家獨立技術法規。出口商在提交設備文件前須直接向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）、BERA（bera.co.bw）和BPC（bpc.bw）確認現行安全標準要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (IEC standard adopted or referenced under BOBS BOS framework)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard, implicitly applicable)
Standards Act (Cap. 74:01) — BOBS mandate to adopt IEC standards as Botswana Standards (BOS)
BERA Act (Cap. 74:04) — BERA technical licensing conditions for grid-tied PV generation

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a China domestic standard assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by BOBS, BERA, or BPC as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence for Botswana market access. Chinese CQC/CGC voluntary safety certificates based on GB/T 37408 do not satisfy Botswana IEC 62109-1/-2 safety requirements.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内标准。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被BOBS、BERA或BPC接受为博茨瓦纳市场准入的IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。依据GB/T 37408的中国CQC/CGC自愿性安全证书不满足博茨瓦纳IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內標準。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被BOBS、BERA或BPC接受為波札那市場准入的IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。依據GB/T 37408的中國CQC/CGC自願性安全證書不滿足波札那IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy the IEC 62109-2 safety type-test requirement expected under the Botswana BOBS IEC-adoption framework and by BERA and BPC for grid-connected solar PV inverters. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to Botswana projects. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 must be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for BOBS conformity assessment, BERA technical licence review, or BPC grid-connection approval. Botswana's climate (high ambient temperatures and dust in the Kalahari region) means that the environmental stress profile for inverters deployed in Botswana may differ from standard IEC test conditions — confirm any special environmental test requirements with the project owner and relevant authorities.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足博茨瓦纳BOBS IEC采纳框架下以及BERA和BPC对并网太阳能光伏逆变器预期的IEC 62109-2安全型式试验要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至博茨瓦纳项目的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。在提交BOBS合格评定、BERA技术许可审查或BPC并网审批所需设备文件前，仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书须补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。博茨瓦纳的气候（卡拉哈里地区高环境温度和扬尘）意味着在博茨瓦纳部署的逆变器环境应力状况可能与IEC标准测试条件不同——请与项目业主和相关机构确认任何特殊环境测试要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足波札那BOBS IEC採納框架下以及BERA和BPC對併網太陽能光伏逆變器預期的IEC 62109-2安全型式試驗要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至波札那項目的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。在提交BOBS合格評定、BERA技術許可審查或BPC併網審批所需設備文件前，僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書須補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。波札那的氣候（卡拉哈里地區高環境溫度和揚塵）意味著在波札那部署的逆變器環境應力狀況可能與IEC標準測試條件不同——請與項目業主和相關機構確認任何特殊環境測試要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under BOBS IEC-adoption framework where the product category falls within declared mandatory conformity assessment scope; expected by BERA as part of technical licensing conditions and by BPC as part of grid-connection approval — confirm precise requirements with BOBS (bobstandards.bw), BERA (bera.co.bw), and BPC (bpc.bw)
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law

source.publisher: IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) — standards adopted by BOBS as Botswana Standards (BOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy the IEC 62109-1/-2 safety requirements expected under the Botswana BOBS IEC-adoption framework and by BERA and BPC. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment documentation for Botswana project review. Confirm current BOBS mandatory conformity scope, BERA technical licensing conditions, and BPC connection requirements directly with each authority at bobstandards.bw, bera.co.bw, and bpc.bw before committing to a test programme. Consider Botswana's high-temperature and dusty Kalahari environment when selecting inverter models and test configurations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足博茨瓦纳BOBS IEC采纳框架下以及BERA和BPC预期的IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。请在提交博茨瓦纳项目审查设备文件前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。在启动测试计划前，请直接在bobstandards.bw、bera.co.bw和bpc.bw向各相关机构确认现行BOBS强制性合规范围、BERA技术许可条件和BPC连接要求。在选择逆变器型号和测试配置时，请考虑博茨瓦纳卡拉哈里高温多尘的环境条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足波札那BOBS IEC採納框架下以及BERA和BPC預期的IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。請在提交波札那項目審查設備文件前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接在bobstandards.bw、bera.co.bw和bpc.bw向各相關機構確認現行BOBS強制性合規範圍、BERA技術許可條件和BPC連接要求。在選擇逆變器型號和測試配置時，請考慮波札那卡拉哈里高溫多塵的環境條件。
